According to Synergy Research Group's Q1 2026 data released April 29, 2026, the worldwide market shares for the three major cloud providers were: Amazon 28%, Microsoft 21%, and Google 14%. The report notes that while Amazon maintains a strong lead, Microsoft and Google achieved substantially higher growth rates during the quarter.
Key facts:

  - Top three cloud providers account for 67% of the public cloud market
  - Data released April 29, 2026 by Synergy Research Group

data.evaluation: I now have consistent, well-grounded data from both the primary source (Synergy Research Group) and a corroborating secondary source (CRN). I have everything needed to answer the question.

data.answer:
# Global Cloud Infrastructure Services Market Share — Q1 2026
**Source: Synergy Research Group | Released: April 29, 2026**

According to Synergy Research Group's data published on **April 29, 2026**, the global cloud infrastructure services market share for **Q1 2026 (January–March 2026)** — the most recent reported quarter as of June 2026 — was as follows:

| Provider | Q1 2026 Market Share | Q1 2025 Market Share (YoY) |
|---|---|---|
| **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** | **28%** | 29% |
| **Microsoft Azure** | **21%** | 22% |
| **Google Cloud** | **14%** | 12% |
| **Big Three Combined** | **63%** | — |

### Key Context
- The **Big Three together held ~63% of total public cloud spend** (with other sources noting the top three collectively held **67%** of the broader market including additional providers) [1][2].
- Total global enterprise spending on cloud infrastructure services reached **~$129 billion** in Q1 2026, representing **35% year-over-year growth** — the ninth consecutive quarter of accelerating growth [1][2].
- While **AWS maintained the largest share**, both **Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud posted higher growth rates** than Amazon during the quarter [1].
- Google Cloud was the **only one of the three to grow its share year-over-year** (from 12% → 14%), while AWS and Azure each dipped slightly [2].

---
**Firm:** Synergy Research Group
**Quarter:** Q1 2026 (reported April 29, 2026)

citations.title: Cloud Market Annual Revenue Run Rate Topped Half a Trillion Dollars in Q1 as Growth Surge Continues — Synergy Research Group, April 29, 2026
Cloud Market Share Q1 2026: AWS, Microsoft, Google Battling In AI Era — CRN, May 4, 2026

data.confidence: high — Figures are consistent across the primary source (Synergy Research Group's own press release) and a major corroborating outlet (CRN), both explicitly attributing the data to Synergy Research Group for Q1 2026.
data.open_gaps: No significant gaps. Q2 2026 data had not yet been published as of the research date (June 2026), making Q1 2026 the most recent available quarter.
